name: smart-shop
description: Smart Local Shop Management & Customer Ordering Platform

scripts.install:all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.setup:
npm run install:all && echo '
✅ All dependencies installed!
📝 Copy backend/.env.example to backend/.env
📝 Copy frontend/.env.example to frontend/.env.local
🚀 Then run: npm run dev:backend and npm run dev:frontend'
